pokemon:iron-bundle.name: Iron Bundle
pokemon:iron-bundle.summary: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.
It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.

form:iron-bundle.name: Iron Bundle
form:iron-bundle.summary: Iron Bundle form with Ice / Water typing.
expansionNotes: Location and breeding metadata can be expanded with a fuller encounter import.
breedingNotes: Breeding notes are pending a richer source import.
